seoTitle: Highvale vs Highworth — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Highvale and Highworth. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Highvale and Highworth.
heading: Highvale vs Highworth — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Highvale, Queensland and Highworth, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Highworth has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Highvale (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Highvale or Highworth safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Highvale has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Highworth scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Highvale scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Highworth scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Highvale or Highworth?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Highworth has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
